title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 23 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 23 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 23 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 2.45 % today, the main contract closed at 835. The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is less. PBF at Shandong port deal 898 yuan/mt.
